title: Product Description
scenario: Write a 50-word product description for a new smartphone model, highlighting its key features.
constraints: Must be in the present tense
Must include the phone's camera resolution

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description meets the word count and tense requirements.
Evaluate the inclusion of the phone's camera resolution and other key features.
Assess the tone of the description, should be enthusiastic and promotional.
